name: Jayla Taylor
ai_summary: 2026-04-14 VideoAsk intro passed. Jayla Taylor (Georgia). My name is j. I'm the youngest of three and I'm in the Army National Guard. I have three nephews and Wendy's that I have always watched when they were small and sometimes still today Located in Augusta, GA, anywhere drive. Availability: FT, PT. Conflict resolution approach: I will immediately stop the hitting by separating the two children, then I'll make sure that her child is okay, and clearly state to the other and they hitting is never, okay, making sure they know.... Why they'd be a great fit: I will make a great up, can't teacher because I am responsible dependable and great kids. I have childcare clearance and experience working in structured environments so I can safely follow instructions and support teachers in the classroom.

transcripts.q3: My name is j. Le Taylor. I'm the youngest of three and I'm in the Army National Guard. I have three nephews and Wendy's that I have always watched when they were small and sometimes still today. I'm experienced with toddler through school age children and I currently work at the YMCA as a day camp counselor.
transcripts.q4: I currently live in Thompson Georgia but I'm willing to relocate to Augusta Georgia or anywhere surrounding there for shifts.
transcripts.q5: I'm mostly looking for full-time shifts but I'm also willing to do part time. I'm available anytime from Sunday through Thursday.
transcripts.q6: I will immediately stop the hitting by separating the two children, then I'll make sure that her child is okay, and clearly state to the other and they hitting is never, okay, making sure they know to use their words instead.
transcripts.q7: I will make a great up, can't teacher because I am responsible dependable and great kids. I have childcare clearance and experience working in structured environments so I can safely follow instructions and support teachers in the classroom.
